text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... Are there any books that might make
for good drawing materi—agh! Oh crap! There's
no time!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The deadline for my manuscript! I'm not gonna
make it for the con!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wait... Trainer?! How long have you been
standing there?!
choice_data_list:
You weren't at training, so I came looking for
you.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
AAGH! What've I done! I've disgraced the entire
racing world!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems she's already properly mortified, so I let
her off with a light warning.
